diagrams.title: Waste Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Shows priority order of waste management methods from most to least preferred
diagrams.purpose: Understanding priority order in waste management for environmental sustainability

diagrams.title: Sanitary Landfill Cross-Section
diagrams.description: Layered structure of engineered landfill showing containment systems
diagrams.purpose: Understanding engineered containment to prevent environmental contamination

diagrams.title: Waste Management Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Complete chain from waste generation to final disposal
elements: Waste Generation → Collection → Transportation → Transfer Station → Processing → Disposal (Landfill/Incineration/Compost) → Recyclable Materials → Market
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing complete solid waste management cycle and recovery options

diagrams.title: Incinerator Schematic
diagrams.purpose: Understanding energy recovery process from waste combustion

diagrams.title: Composting Process Flow
diagrams.description: Stages in aerobic composting of organic waste
diagrams.purpose: Understanding biological waste conversion to useful product
